name: Clean with Passion for Now
overview: Gil Oh-so, an employee at a cleaning company, meets Jang Seon-gyul, the boss of the company. The two are diametric opposite when it comes to cleanliness. With the help of Oh-sol, Seon-gyul faces his mysophobia and falls in love with her.

trailers.title: Clean With Passion For Now 일단 뜨겁게 청소하라 Trailer | Available with subs 12h after Korea!
